title: Colony Counter
purpose: Mark colonies on petri dish images, categorize phenotypes, and calculate CFU with dilution correction.
learningTime: Learn this tool in under 2 minutes

tour.title: Load image
tour.body: Upload a photograph of your petri dish or plate.

tour.title: Categories
tour.body: Select or create phenotype categories before marking colonies.

tour.title: Mark colonies
tour.body: Click each colony to place a marker. Adjust marker size in the sidebar.

tour.title: Export
tour.body: Save annotated images and colony counts for your records.

overview.purpose: Manual colony counting with categorical classification and CFU estimation.
overview.useCase: Quantify colony forming units after serial dilution plating.
overview.inputs: Petri dish images; dilution factor; category assignments.
overview.outputs: Per-category counts, CFU estimates, annotated image exports.

workflow.title: Upload image
workflow.description: Load a clear photograph of your plate.

workflow.title: Configure dilution
workflow.description: Set dilution factor for CFU calculation.

tips: Use consistent lighting when photographing plates.
Set marker radius to match typical colony size.
Verify dilution exponent before reporting CFU/mL.

faq.a: CFU incorporates colony count, dilution factor, and plated volume according to sidebar settings.
